languages.text: "Я вытерплю боль, Лорд-капитан. Дайте только завершить начатое. Расплавить лицо последнему железопоклоннику".

traits.locale_text: "Я вытерплю боль, Лорд-капитан. Дайте только завершить начатое. Расплавить лицо последнему железопоклоннику".

languages.text: "I can stand the pain, Lord Captain. Just let me finish what I started. Melt the face of the last iron-worshipper."
languages.original_text: "Я вытерплю боль, Лорд-капитан. Дайте только завершить начатое. Расплавить лицо последнему железопоклоннику".

traits.locale_text: "I can stand the pain, Lord Captain. Just let me finish what I started. Melt the face of the last iron-worshipper."
"I can stand the pain, Lord Captain. Just let me finish what I started. Melt the face of the last iron-worshipper."
"I can stand the pain, Lord Captain. Just let me finish what I started. Melt the face of the last iron-worshipper."
"I can stand the pain, Lord Captain. Just let me finish what I started. Melt the face of the last iron-worshipper."

languages.text: "Ich kann den Schmerz ertragen, Lord Captain. Lasst mich nur beenden, was ich begonnen habe. Das Gesicht des letzten Eisenanbeters einzuschmelzen."
languages.original_text: "I can stand the pain, Lord Captain. Just let me finish what I started. Melt the face of the last iron-worshipper."

traits.locale_text: "Ich kann den Schmerz ertragen, Lord Captain. Lasst mich nur beenden, was ich begonnen habe. Das Gesicht des letzten Eisenanbeters einzuschmelzen."

languages.text: « La douleur est supportable, {mf|seigneur-capitaine|seigneure-capitaine}. Permettez-moi de finir ce que j'ai commencé. Laissez-moi faire fondre le visage du dernier adorateur du fer. »
languages.original_text: "I can stand the pain, Lord Captain. Just let me finish what I started. Melt the face of the last iron-worshipper."

traits.locale_text: « La douleur est supportable, {mf|seigneur-capitaine|seigneure-capitaine}. Permettez-moi de finir ce que j'ai commencé. Laissez-moi faire fondre le visage du dernier adorateur du fer. »

languages.text: “这份疼我还忍得住，舰长大人。只要让我把事干完就行。就剩最后一个钢铁崇拜者的脸没熔了。”
languages.original_text: "I can stand the pain, Lord Captain. Just let me finish what I started. Melt the face of the last iron-worshipper."

traits.locale_text: “这份疼我还忍得住，舰长大人。只要让我把事干完就行。就剩最后一个钢铁崇拜者的脸没熔了。”

languages.text: «Puedo soportar el dolor, Lord Capitán, pero deje que termine lo que he empezado. Deje que le derrita la cara al último adorador del hierro».
languages.original_text: "I can stand the pain, Lord Captain. Just let me finish what I started. Melt the face of the last iron-worshipper."

traits.locale_text: «Puedo soportar el dolor, Lord Capitán, pero deje que termine lo que he empezado. Deje que le derrita la cara al último adorador del hierro».

languages.text: 「痛みに耐えますよ、ロード・キャプテン。私が始めたことを最後までやらせてください。最後の鉄崇拝者の顔を溶かしてやる」
languages.original_text: "I can stand the pain, Lord Captain. Just let me finish what I started. Melt the face of the last iron-worshipper."

traits.locale_text: 「痛みに耐えますよ、ロード・キャプテン。私が始めたことを最後までやらせてください。最後の鉄崇拝者の顔を溶かしてやる」

languages.text: "Acıya dayanabilirim Lord Kaptan. Sadece başladığım işi bitirmeme izin verin. Son demir tapanın yüzünü eriteyim."
languages.original_text: "I can stand the pain, Lord Captain. Just let me finish what I started. Melt the face of the last iron-worshipper."

traits.locale_text: "Acıya dayanabilirim Lord Kaptan. Sadece başladığım işi bitirmeme izin verin. Son demir tapanın yüzünü eriteyim."
